Clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior

What should happen.

## Actual behavior

What happens instead. Include error messages, stack traces, logs.

- Python version: [e.g. 3.12.7]
- Docker version: [run `docker --version`]
